channel.title: Homepage on Augustin Consulting Ltd
channel.description: Recent content in Homepage on Augustin Consulting Ltd

item.title: Alexandry Augustin, PhD
item.description: Impact-driven data scientist with proven track record of delivering valuable insights via data analytics, advanced statistical and machine learning methods.

item.title: Software Development
item.description: Lorem markdownum aequalis strigis. Saetigeri iubeas, vultu huic alvum nondum de obside ut laniavit arbor palmis, cum quin. Rupes vetat videndo, armigerae crimen habet Priamum nec. Ne verba patulosque numen vix libet Agitabitur signa lympha; non lacunae mox cum tumulis quoque triste dictis. Ignibus inpatiens explorat, te tegens ferro nocere haud, et Dulichium tui male! Quo sed fuit flexit et hic die solido, gloria? Cum det dixit Parcarum qui spemque est Exit ex huic Quod consiste agitataque claustraque vicina videt lacertis Loquor videt Ardua non igne caelesti coniugis cognovi diversorum Per nunc pariterque saeva vindicet Locus evicit loquuntur Tyrrhena omnes, obstipui pugnabant temptavit Phoco vati dabant deus.

item.title: Case Studies
item.description: Below are some of the data science solutions we have implemented over recent months. Simulating Biological Sample Flows Through Laboratory with Discrete Event Simulation ​ We recently collaborated with Univeristy of Southampton NHS Trust on a simulation project to try to understand and minimise delays of COVID-19 saliva testing. We worked together to design an discrete event model in python that produces projections for various metrics under different conditions. This enabled us to understand the implications of different triage and cohorting strategies and to quantify the risks.

item.title: About
item.description: The sheer amount and variety of existing and new data generated in the world today are unprecedented. As this growth continues, so do the opportunities for businesses to use their data to create change that matters. We provide professional consulting services to help clients achieve their objectives through data science. We are technology agnostic and able to work with our clients' preferred technologies and platforms. Once the tools and models are implemented, we focus on building and transferring capabilities and skills to ensure that analytics becomes a sustained competitive advantage.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Got a project in mind or just want to hear more? Get in touch and we’ll get back to you right away.
